ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1661. His orazione `Volendo Apollo abolire una delle arti liberali, qual di esse doverebbe restar abolita`, was delivered to the Ricovrati academicians on the day of his aggregation to the Academy. It is published in Varotari, Opere (1666).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
